title: galium setuliflorum
intro: Galium setuliflorum, also known as Setuliflorous Bedstraw, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Galium setuliflorum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatism, and soothe digestive problems. Galium setuliflorum is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusions, and can also be used in salves and ointments to support wound healing.
